memberdef.argsstring: (const string &srcfield, const ObjId &tgt, const string &tgtfield, const string &msgtype)
memberdef.name: connectToSingle

memberdef.argsstring: (const string &srcfield, const MooseVec &tgt, const string &tgtfield, const string &msgtype)
memberdef.name: connectToVec

detaileddescription.para: Get vector element. Vector element could be dataIndex or fieldIndex. Allows negative indexing.

memberdef.argsstring: (const string &path, unsigned int n=1, const string &dtype="")
memberdef.name: MooseVec

detaileddescription.para: Create a MooseVec from path. If path does not exist and dtype is a valid moose class name, then create the object. Otherwise python wrapper should raise an error
@Synopsis API function. Set attribute on vector. This is the top-level generic function.
